noveltyJustification: Separated low-cost native image descriptors from genuinely new multimodal retrieval and showed why neither requires Rust for the MVP.

summary: Palette, perceptual hash, and simple geometry add validation and duplicate detection, but Sharp makes Rust unnecessary.
CLIP-class screenshot embeddings add new text-to-image and image-to-image retrieval; local native inference is material but Rust remains optional for MVP.

reason: Existing Node native image and inference bindings can validate relevance with less boundary and packaging risk.
